matches.match_rationale: Payroll statutory deduction processing is a multi-step workflow with branching logic.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An agentic payroll compliance workflow that applies rate tables, computes deductions, flags ceiling breaches, and generates remittance forms.

matches.match_rationale: Over- and under-withholding errors follow statistical patterns that anomaly detection can flag.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A payroll anomaly scanner scoring each employee computed deductions against historical baselines and statutory ceiling rules.

matches.match_rationale: Finance staff frequently need to query current statutory rates. A conversational agent can answer instantly.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A compliance Q&A assistant grounded in official agency circulars and rate schedules.

matches.match_rationale: Multi-site operators receive payroll data in inconsistent formats. AI-assisted transformation handles schema mapping.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-assisted ETL layer normalizing per-campus HR/payroll exports to a unified employee-salary schema.

matches.match_rationale: A risk scoring model can estimate probability and financial cost of non-compliance per remittance cycle.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A compliance risk dashboard scoring each pending statutory remittance on probability of penalty.
